cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which present Claire ends up with after all the swaps. So, the initial setup is: - Alice has a brown present. - Bob has an orange ball. - Claire has a green present. - Dave has a blue present. - Eve has a white present. Then there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Eve and Bob swap their gifts. So Eve originally has white, Bob has orange. After swapping, Eve has orange and Bob has white.
